rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies the defect at line 743 in the FLIP opcode handling in src/be_vm.c.
rationale.local_fix: The proposed change to replace var_setint(dst, -a->v.i) with var_setint(dst, ~a->v.i) matches the developer patch.
rationale.global_fix: The response explains that the bug is due to incorrect implementation of the bitwise NOT operation, using negation instead of bitwise complement.
